CustomField.description: Overrides the org-level Donation Matching Rule for this batch. Semicolon-delimited list of Data Import field API names used to compare imported donations against existing Opportunities and Payments for matching.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the fields used to match donations in this batch against existing Opportunities and Payments. Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple.
CustomField.label: Donation Matching Rule
